name: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: Docker container for managing Nginx proxy hosts with a simple, powerful interface, providing free SSL, and acting as a local API Gateway.

aws.parity: Terminate TLS and route hosts/paths locally exactly as an ALB + ACM certificate will in production.
aws.deploy: Recreate the proxy hosts as ALB listener rules/target groups and issue the cert in ACM.

variables.label: Admin Panel Port
variables.description: Port to access the Nginx Proxy Manager administration web interface.
